guardrails: This proposal does not install packages or modify pnpm-lock.yaml.
Every proposed third-party dependency remains pending human approval before implementation.
The currently approved W1.5 minimal dependency group remains unchanged.
No accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, runtime behavior, IPC, renderer storage, packaging, or updater behavior changes are included in W1.5.171.

proposed_packages.name: @electron-forge/cli
proposed_packages.reason: Provides the Forge CLI needed to convert the current Electron/Vite shell into a packaged desktop project.

proposed_packages.name: @electron-forge/plugin-vite
proposed_packages.reason: Keeps Forge packaging aligned with the existing Vite renderer and TypeScript build.

implementation_sequence: Add Forge config without changing runtime IPC or renderer storage boundaries.
Keep hidden-window smoke tests and desktop Node tests green after packaging config is introduced.
Defer platform makers, signing, publishing, and installer artifacts until the packaging slice explicitly requests them.
risks: Forge config can conflict with the existing Vite build output if introduced without a focused packaging slice.
Cross-platform makers and signing are not covered by this minimal gate.

proposed_packages.name: tailwindcss
proposed_packages.reason: Uses the latest observed Tailwind 3.x line to match the existing PostCSS/autoprefixer gate without adding a Tailwind 4 PostCSS plugin package outside the ledger.

proposed_packages.name: postcss
proposed_packages.reason: Required by the Tailwind 3 PostCSS pipeline and compatible with autoprefixer.

proposed_packages.name: autoprefixer
proposed_packages.reason: Provides browser prefixing for the Tailwind/PostCSS desktop renderer pipeline.

implementation_sequence: Add Tailwind and PostCSS config in the desktop package only.
Migrate existing renderer CSS incrementally instead of rewriting the whole shell.
Keep current visual smoke layout evidence as the acceptance baseline.
risks: Tailwind 4 is newer, but adopting it would require revisiting the ledger package list and PostCSS integration shape.
A broad CSS migration could invalidate accumulated visual smoke baselines if not split into smaller slices.

proposed_packages.name: @xyflow/react
proposed_packages.reason: Implements the roadmap React Flow Canvas while matching the existing React 18 dependency boundary through peer dependencies of react >=17 and react-dom >=17.

implementation_sequence: Replace the current focused read-only Canvas scaffold with a React Flow backed view in a dedicated slice.
Preserve local-only selection semantics until runtime mutation commands are explicitly introduced.
Add a 100-node performance smoke before claiming EXIT-P1-12 readiness.
verification_plan_after_approval: Electron visual smoke matrix with 100-node Canvas interaction evidence
risks: React Flow can introduce layout and pointer-event regressions in the existing dense desktop shell.
Drag/connect/edit behavior must remain separate from WorkflowGraph persistence until the runtime command contract is ready.

proposed_packages.name: electron-updater
proposed_packages.reason: Provides runtime update checks through GitHub Releases for the packaged Electron app.

proposed_packages.name: electron-builder
proposed_packages.reason: Provides the builder/publishing toolchain referenced by ADR-0006 and the M1.5 roadmap for installer and update metadata generation.

dependency_gates.install_command_after_approval: pnpm --filter @cw/desktop add electron-updater@6.8.9 && pnpm --filter @cw/desktop add -D electron-builder@26.15.3
implementation_sequence: Add updater configuration only after a packaging slice has a stable app id and artifact naming plan.
Keep update metadata and credentials out of committed source and secure/cache paths out of git tracking.
Record cross-platform startup evidence before moving EXIT-P1-7 out of blocked status.
verification_plan_after_approval: Updater configuration smoke with network calls mocked
risks: Updater work depends on packaging identifiers, signing strategy, and GitHub Releases credentials that are not settled in this proposal.
Misconfigured updater code could violate the repository rule against committing secrets or credential flow details.

approval_request.required_before: Any package.json or pnpm-lock.yaml mutation for the proposed packages.
approval_request.requested_decision: Approve, reject, or revise each dependency gate independently.
approval_request.default_if_not_approved: Keep all dependency gates blocked and continue with non-dependency documentation or acceptance-checklist slices.

next_recommended_slices_after_approval.title: FR-001 through FR-020 UX acceptance checklist extraction
next_recommended_slices_after_approval.reason: Can proceed without dependency installation and is required for EXIT-P1-1.

next_recommended_slices_after_approval.title: Desktop dependency gate implementation after human approval
next_recommended_slices_after_approval.reason: Only valid if one or more W1.5.171 dependency gates receive explicit human approval.
